title: Execution Mode Schema
description: Defines the execution mode configuration for running optimization sessions

ExecutionMode.x-deprecated: Use algorithm/offline and hybrid_api_options instead. execution_mode remains accepted for compatibility and will be removed in a future major version.
ExecutionMode.description:
Deprecated execution mode for legacy optimization clients. Superseded by algorithm/offline and hybrid_api_options; the existing values remain valid for compatibility and this field will be removed in a future major version:
- edge_analytics: Legacy client-side orchestration (grid, random algorithms).
- hybrid: Legacy client-side execution with backend next-trial suggestions.
- hybrid_api: Legacy external API-based optimization.

HybridConfiguration.description: Optional configuration for hybrid execution mode (auto-detected from session config when absent)

session_id.description: Unique session identifier for hybrid execution

optimizer_endpoint.description: Direct endpoint URL for optimizer access

batch_size.description: Number of metrics to batch before submission

retry_attempts.description: Number of retry attempts for failed submissions

HybridApiConfiguration.description: Configuration for hybrid_api execution mode — required when execution_mode is hybrid_api

endpoint.description: HTTP endpoint implementing the Traigent Hybrid Mode API contract

transport.description: Transport protocol for the external service

auth_token.description: Bearer token for the external service (stored as a secret reference)

execution_mode.x-deprecated: Use algorithm/offline and hybrid_api_options instead. execution_mode will be removed in a future major version.
execution_mode.description: Deprecated legacy execution-mode selector. Use algorithm/offline for public execution behavior and hybrid_api_options for external evaluator configuration.

algorithm.description: Public SDK optimization algorithm selector. auto lets Traigent choose cloud-first automatic execution with local fallback.

offline.description: force fully-local execution with no backend egress.

hybrid_api_options.description: Optional external evaluator configuration. Meaningful only when an external evaluator is configured.

experiment_id.description: Reference to the experiment using this execution mode

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this configuration was created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification
